text:
Cost: With curated events schedule, prices vary from over $150.
General Admission into Walk-Around Grand Tastings $55.
Most ticket packages range from over $100 around $245 high end.
2019 Virginia Wine Expo® presented Publix national, six-day destination wine food event, February 26-March Richmond, Virginia, celebrating outstanding Virginia, Chilean, Central Coast, Santa Cruz Mountains Southern California wines, Virginia spirits, Virginia cider, premium whiskey from around U.S., global smoked cuisine, native Virginia cuisine, artisan, ethnic, southern American cuisine from some Richmond's best chefs, more.
Experience Richmond's Virginia's craft beverage culinary excellence events including Walk-Around Grand Tastings, SMOKED!, Nightbeat, Noodle Dumpling Affair, Bounty Virginia, Rooted Richmond Sparkling Brunch, When Dixie Margaux, Lusty Oyster Sparkling Brunch, Finding Perfect Cigar Pairing, Master Class Seminars many more.
